traffic_stops.sql: select * from cad_calls where `Incident Type`='Traffic Stop'

oct2025.sql: select * from cad_calls where date between '2025-10-01' and '2025-11-01'

nov2025.sql: select * from cad_calls where date between '2025-11-01' and '2025-12-01'

dec2025.sql: select * from cad_calls where date between '2025-12-01' and '2026-01-01'

jan2026.sql: select * from cad_calls where date between '2026-01-01' and '2026-01-31'

feb2026.sql: select * from cad_calls where date between '2026-02-01' and '2026-01-28'

mar2026.sql: select * from cad_calls where date between '2026-03-01' and '2026-03-31'
